pageContext.name: Thomas Shelby
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Thomas Shelby!  From Peaky Blinders, this Thomas Shelby Art Scale Statue is a limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted collectible.  Peaky Blinders fans, don't miss your chance to add this Thomas Shelby statue to your collection!
